properties.description: Process pending companies

activities.name: PendingCompaniesLookup
activities.description: lookup for the Pending status companies.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
select c.Id as companyId,c.StatusCode as companyStatusCode, s.StatusCode as subscriptionStatusCode, t.id as tenantId, s.PlanId as planId, s.id as subscriptionId from Companys c
inner join Tenants t on t.id = c.TenantId
inner join CompanySubscriptions cs on cs.CompanyId = c.Id
inner join Subscriptions s on s.id = cs.SubscriptionId where c.StatusCode = 'PENDING'

activities.description: Call the user in a foreach and call the external API.

properties.description: pipeline to create a signup for the company

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT TOP(5) *
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Uid AS companyId,
        c.CompanyName,
        s.SiteName,
        c.Address1,
        s.Address AS address2,
        co.Uid AS OldCountryId,
        co.CountryName AS oldCountryName,
        'TestCity' AS City,
        c.PostCode,
        'English' AS Language,
        '851f1dca-53e3-421b-abd2-fdae4e4a389f' AS defaultTimeZone,
        'D6B86821-80F7-40BD-98EB-A1BB5C141EC3' AS planId,
        u.uid AS oldUserId,
        u.FirstName AS userFirstName,
        u.LastName AS userLastName,
        u.EmailAddress AS UserEmail,
        u.Password AS userPassword,
        u.Password AS userCofirmPassword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.CompanyName ORDER BY u.uid) AS rn
    FROM Tbl_Company c
    JOIN Tbl_Country co ON c.CountryId = co.Uid
    JOIN Tbl_User u ON u.DefaultCompany = c.uid
    JOIN Tbl_Site s ON s.Uid = u.DefaultSite
) t
WHERE t.rn = 1

body.value:
@concat('{',
  '"name":"', item().CompanyName, '",',
  '"siteName":"', item().SiteName, '",',
  '"address1":"Default Address",',

properties.description: signature observer blob migration.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT SignatureObserver from Tbl_ObservationDetail
where CompanyId = 1169 and SignatureObserver is not null and TRIM(SignatureObserver) != '' and SignatureObserver like '%pilotstorage%'
ORDER BY uid 
OFFSET @{variables('offset')} ROWS 
FETCH NEXT @{variables('batchSize')} ROWS ONLY

transformations.name: aggregate1
transformations.description: Aggregating data by 'NewCompanyId, NewSiteId, PersonName' producing columns 'count'

scriptLines: selectExistingUser filter(Email == $AdminEmail && CanDelete == false() && StatusCode == 1) ~> filter1

derivedColumn1 derive(lastName = iif(length(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))))==0, '', concat(upper(left(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))),1)), lower(substring(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))),2,length(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))))-1))))) ~> derivedColumn2

aggregate1 filter(regexMatch(PersonName, '.*[A-Za-z0-9].*') && lower(PersonName) != 'n/a' && lower(PersonName) != 'n' && lower(PersonName) != 'a' && lower(PersonName) != 'none') ~> filterSpecialCharacters
filterSpecialCharacters filter(lower(PersonName) != lower('Mick Bragg') && lower(PersonName) != lower('Adam Mathewâ€™s')) ~> CompanySpecificChange

unpivot1 filter((Fitteroperator == 0 && (PersonType == 'other_operator' || PersonType == 'other_operator')) || (Fitteroffsider == 0 && (PersonType == 'other_offsider' || PersonType == 'other offsider'))) ~> filter3
joinNameCorrection derive(PersonName = iif(isNull(CorrectName) || length(trim(CorrectName)) == 0, PersonName, CorrectName)) ~> applyNameCorrection

PasswordHardcoded = iif(and(    length(Password) >= 8 && length(Password) <= 256,    (iif(regexMatch(Password, `[A-Z]`), 1, 0) +     iif(regexMatch(Password, `[a-z]`), 1, 0) +     iif(regexMatch(Password, `[0-9]`), 1, 0) +     iif(regexMatch(Password, `[^A-Za-z0-9]`), 1, 0)) >= 3), Password, 'M3r@thon@1')) ~> UserDerivedColumn

scriptLines: IsReviewed = iif((ObservationStatus == 2 || ObservationStatus == 1) && reviewer_id > 0, true(), false()),
Other_offsiderInComment = iif(other_offsider == '' || isNull(other_offsider), '', 'Other Offsider: '+ other_offsider + iif(other_operator == '' || isNull(other_operator), '.', ', ')),
Other_operatorInComment = iif(other_operator == '' || isNull(other_operator), '', 'Other Operator: '+ other_operator + '.')) ~> derivedColumnSafetyObservation
disjoint: true) ~> split1@(ObservedPersonOffsider, ObservedPersonOperator, ObservedPersonOtherOffsider, ObservedPersonOtherOperator)
derivedColumnSafetyObservation filter(iif((ObservationStatus == 2 || ObservationStatus == 1) && reviewer_id > 0, true(), false())) ~> filterReviewer
MigrationComment = iif(Other_offsiderInComment + Other_operatorInComment == '', '', 'Migration: ' + Other_offsiderInComment + Other_operatorInComment)) ~> derivedColumn1
derivedColumn1 derive(AdditionalComment = iif(AdditionalComment == '' || isNull(AdditionalComment) ,'', AdditionalComment)) ~> derivedColumn2
joinOffsiderCorrection derive(other_offsider = iif(isNull(Correct), other_offsider, Correct)) ~> derivedOffsiderCorrected
joinOperatorCorrection derive(other_operator = iif(isNull(Correct), other_operator, Correct)) ~> derivedOperatorCorrected

transformations.name: aggregate1
transformations.description: Aggregating data by 'NewCompanyId, NewSiteId, PersonName' producing columns 'count'

scriptLines: normalizeExistingDisplayName filter(Email == $AdminEmail && CanDelete == false() && StatusCode == 1) ~> filter1

derivedColumn1 derive(lastName = iif(length(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))))==0, '', concat(upper(left(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))),1)), lower(substring(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))),2,length(trim(substring(PersonName, add(length(substringIndex(PersonName,' ',1)),1))))-1))))) ~> derivedColumn2

aggregate1 filter(regexMatch(PersonName, '.*[A-Za-z0-9].*') && lower(PersonName) != 'n/a' && lower(PersonName) != 'n' && lower(PersonName) != 'a' && lower(PersonName) != 'none') ~> filterSpecialCharacters
filterSpecialCharacters filter(lower(PersonName) != lower('Mick Bragg') && lower(PersonName) != lower('Adam Mathewâ€™s')) ~> CompanySpecificChange

unpivot1 filter((Fitteroperator == 0 && (PersonType == 'other_operator' || PersonType == 'other_operator')) || (Fitteroffsider == 0 && (PersonType == 'other_offsider' || PersonType == 'other offsider'))) ~> filter3
joinNameCorrection derive(PersonName = iif(isNull(CorrectName) || length(trim(CorrectName)) == 0, PersonName, CorrectName)) ~> applyNameCorrection

derivedColumn1 derive(AdditionalComment = iif(AdditionalComment == '' || isNull(AdditionalComment) ,'', AdditionalComment)) ~> derivedColumn2
joinOffsiderCorrection derive(other_offsider = iif(isNull(Correct), other_offsider, Correct)) ~> derivedOffsiderCorrected
joinOperatorCorrection derive(other_operator = iif(isNull(Correct), other_operator, Correct)) ~> derivedOperatorCorrected
